title: VerifierRecord
description: Protocol-owned verifier descriptor family for deterministic key identity, algorithm metadata, public-key bytes, logical purpose/scope/owner, recorded posture, and lifecycle status. Trusted Go verification is authoritative; runner verification is parity/supporting only.

schema_id.description: Stable protocol object-family identifier for verifier records.

schema_version.description: Exact protocol schema version used to validate this verifier record.

key_id.description: Canonical key-id algorithm profile. Verifier key IDs use key_sha256:<64-lowercase-hex> derived from canonical public-key bytes.

key_id_value.description: Deterministic SHA-256 lowercase-hex key identifier derived from canonical public-key bytes. Topology-neutral and never a path, username, or local keystore handle.

alg.description: Signature algorithm this verifier record supports. MVP allows ed25519 only.

public_key.description: Public key material used for detached signature verification.

logical_purpose.description: Logical authority purpose served by this verifier key.

logical_scope.description: Topology-neutral logical scope for this verifier.

owner_principal.description: Principal identity owning or controlling this verifier key.

key_protection_posture.description: Key custody posture for the private key paired with this verifier.

identity_binding_posture.description: Identity-to-key binding posture for this verifier.

presence_mode.description: User-presence mode associated with signer operations for this verifier.

created_at.description: RFC 3339 timestamp recording when this verifier was created.

created_by.description: Principal identity that created or registered this verifier record.

status.description: Current verifier status used by admission policy for future signatures.

status_changed_at.description: RFC 3339 timestamp recording when status last changed.

status_reason.description: Operator-facing reason for current status, rotation, or revocation posture.
